accept: act show <id> --include-ops in text mode renders an op summary (1 line per op: timestamp, op_type, short payload key) below the snapshot.
OR: --include-ops without --json errors with a clear message ('act show: --include-ops requires --json'); doc updated to match.
payload.description: Discovered 2026-05-10 by UX-eval agent. 'act show <id> --include-ops' is documented as 'inline the HLC-sorted op stream alongside the snapshot.' In text mode, output is identical to plain 'show'. Ops only appear when --json is also passed. So either the flag is doc'd wrong or the text rendering is missing.
payload.title: act show --include-ops is a no-op without --json
